meaning: n.凯恩斯主义者adj.凯恩斯理论的,符合凯恩斯理论的
examples: And the results were clearly Keynesian.
There was a cost to this Keynesian victory, however.
We have seen the results of Keynesian economics in this so called muted inflation.
Gone are grandiose plans for massive stimulus to boost output and employment on Keynesian steroids.
